title: Microservices in Scala and Java
description: Note: microservices are covered in depth at Data Pipelines By the Bay, a part of http://data.bythebay.io . Early bird registration ends March 31. This meetup will be hosted by Tradeshift. Chris Richardson, the founder of the original Cloudfoundry and now http://Eventuate.io and http://microservices.io , will overview microservices in Scala and Java. Jamie Allen, the Senior Director of Global Services at Lightbend (formerly Typesafe), will outline its vision for microservices and talk about Lagom, a new platform.
